item.title: I think the irony is lost on them
item.dc:creator: nezo

item.title: And this is how a blonde light skinned Norwegian who came here with all the correct paperwork got treated, so this is likely better than many
item.description: "I’m Norwegian and I was arrested by ICE at my green card interview in November 2025, San Diego. I came here LEGALLY in 2022 on an F-1 visa and went to college, graduated then got the OPT work visa where I worked and paid taxes to the US." https://www.instagram.com/hanne_engan
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Another dump of satisfying things, enjoy !
item.description:
The hat every dad needs.
The surprise of a lifetime.
I love everyone involved here ...
Skating on a pump track.
This glass bridge in China _cracks_ when you step on it.
Different views from the same match.
Laser sculpted rock.
Installing a cricket bat grip.
In front of a crowd, too ...
New window washing drone at this office.
When a bulldozer becomes a lifeboat.
The Velorex was a three-wheeled small car made in Czechoslovakia for the disabled after World War II.
They don't make them like this anymore. The 1969 Mustang was built to intimidate.
maybe it's the paintjob ?
Germany’s BR612 class of trains can tilt up to 8° inwards allowing them to take curves at higher speeds
Motorcycle bump starter.
Goalkeepers gloves.
Package wringer.
Just cheese please ...
Two male peacocks fighting over the peahen ...
All that showing off, and she doesn't even pay attention to him
Vintage water-activated gummed paper tape dispenser.
A homeless dog walked into a veterinary clinic and showed its wounded paw, hoping someone would help, and they did.
I always wanted one but now i am 37 years young ....
Gates opening on the Kawamata dam.
Homeowner moves entire beachfront house inland after neighboring homes collapsed into the ocean.
A Sugar Glider shows the beauty of an excellent glide from height and a perfect landing.
Candle being put out automatically.
Huge lantern built in Sri Lanka for their annual Vesak festival.
Dog clears a sheep traffic jam....
Chinese calligraphy with 2 ink pens in one hand.
A Crane assembling another crane.
Captured by a school of sardines.
This Drawbridge is a Testament to Engineering and Beauty !
On the Brussels's tram ... for a transport ticket !
Collapse and movement of Fresh lava from the dome of Mount Merapi, Java Island, Indonesia.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: Epstein who? Never met the guy
item.dc:creator: ChocolatePoopy

item.title: Have some people playing music: #8
item.description:
https://www.instagram.com/therealauracle/
https://www.instagram.com/anniehurdygurdy/ Song: Mighty Morphin' Power Rangers theme song
https://www.instagram.com/_switch_angel/
https://www.instagram.com/singersoundsystem/ Song: Knight Rider Theme
https://www.instagram.com/boze_style/ song: thomas the train theme song
https://www.instagram.com/bostonbaroque/ Song: ABBA - Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!
https://www.instagram.com/phillipflute2368/ Song: Vivadi - Spring
Oleksandr Khrustevych https://www.youtube.com/@Hrustevich Song: Vivaldi - Summer
https://www.instagram.com/p/Cz1E6VsIBvD/ Song: Vivaldi - Autumn
https://www.instagram.com/harrison.saltzman/ Song Vivaldi - Winter
Song: Scotland the Brave
https://www.instagram.com/sayo.komada/ Song: iron Maiden - The Trooper
https://www.instagram.com/p/DUo7HaPCA54/ not the artist, (can't find a page or other info), but gives more info) Song: George Michael - Careless Whisper
https://www.instagram.com/synthony/ Song: Darude - Sandstorm
https://www.instagram.com/pdsoloz29/ Song: Neon Genesis Evangelion theme song
full video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Eda-anZvjZY song: Leroy Anderson - The Typewriter
https://www.instagram.com/der_schaelm/ song: George Baker Selection - Una Paloma Blanca
https://www.instagram.com/ninimusicofficial/ (instrument) https://www.instagram.com/kuularmusic/ (vocals)
https://www.instagram.com/glasblassing/ song: Aram Chatsjatoerjan - Sabre dance
https://www.instagram.com/partyzgit/ Song: Offenbach - Can-Can
https://www.instagram.com/somelinez/ Song: ? Warning, next song has flashing lights near the end.
https://www.instagram.com/of_lupage/
Song: Tokyo Ghoul Opening
https://www.instagram.com/dlxmusicstockholm/ Song; Opus - Live is life.
https://www.instagram.com/songsofeden/ Song: Mozart - Rondo Alla Turca As always, I tried to make an as diverse collection as possible, and tried to find all the sources of these amazing artists. Do check them out. If you know the few that I couldn't find, please share and I'll add them gladly. Want to see more amazing talent? Part 1 https://imgur.com/gallery/lFqgAvI Part 2 https://imgur.com/gallery/X6lzCG9 Part 3 https://imgur.com/gallery/0yLvj8Q Part 4 https://imgur.com/gallery/ZDEbHSs Part 5 https://imgur.com/gallery/BS59jS4 Part 6 https://imgur.com/gallery/xmmWIVe Part 7 https://imgur.com/gallery/mACISP7
item.dc:creator: cosonfused

item.title: We Already Had a Trans Bond Girl
item.description:
"I wouldn't buy that Playboy." "Good. Don't." The first trans Bond girl was an absolute menace, and I loved every minute of the interview I found of her. My latest video is more of a video essay than my normal style, and dives deep into Tula's Interview with Phil Donahue in 1990. The most shocking part for me, is that the interview made me feel like a 1990 talk show audience understood trans people better than some people do today, while also sounding exactly like every one of my comment sections across social media. I am really stoked about this video so wanted to let you all know it Premieres tomorrow at 7:30 AM PST. Come hang out and live chat with me! https://youtu.be/aAQAzanuYiU
That guys face lol The question he is reacting to is wonderful
Me when you all don't watch my video premiere tomorrow morning... https://youtu.be/aAQAzanuYiU
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Child marriage with parental consent is still legal in Wisconsin. Republicans have blocked Democratic efforts to change that.
item.description: Last month deep red Oklahoma became the 17th state to ban child marriage — the practice of allowing minors, typically 16- and 17-year-olds, to marry with parental consent. Advertisement “Oklahoma has a responsibility to protect children and make sure they have the opportunity to reach adulthood before making decisions that will shape the rest of their lives,” Republican state Rep. Nicole Miller said in a press release. Most states that have banned child marriage to date are led by Democrats. Wisconsin, where Republicans control the Legislature, is not following their lead. In Wisconsin 16- and 17-year-olds can still be married with written parental permission submitted to a county clerk along with a standard marriage license. Between 2015 and 2024, 297 minors were married in Wisconsin, according to the Legislative Reference Bureau. Notably, these teenagers can be married not just to other minors, but also to adults. State law also provides an exception to its rules on statutory rape: Sexual relations between an adult and a teenager are not a crime as long as they are married. “These are marriages between a minor woman and an older man,” said state Rep. Ann Roe, D-Janesville, a co-author of recent legislation to ban the practice. “The behavior outside of marriage would be a felony. … Using this old law that’s still on the books that allows for child marriage is incredibly disturbing and incredibly dangerous for young women.” In the 2025-26 legislative session, Roe joined Sen. Mark Spreitzer, D-Beloit, in his yearslong campaign to end child marriage in Wisconsin. Each time, the legislation has died in committee. It has never received a public hearing, much less reached a floor vote. Republican leadership has refused to move it, saying the proposed law infringes on the rights of parents to decide what’s best for their children. https://milwaukeenns.org/2026/06/07/wisconsin-child-marriage-law-parental-consent-legal-republican-democrat/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: I carry shelter dogs around NYC in a dog backpack to help them get adopted. Meet Willy!
item.dc:creator: MaxRay23

item.title: Some OC RHM <3
item.description: A beautiful creature I saw the other day. He and his friend were climbing on my picnic blanket trying to steal food xD They were so feisty. My friend got up and waves her blanket at them, but they didnt get scared, they were just not giving a fuck lol Their feet are kinda scary, so I was a bit anxious ngl xD But beautiful birds either way <3 Have a good start into the new week and dont forget to drink your water :)
item.dc:creator: walpurrga

item.title: It's all class war
item.description: https://bsky.app/profile/gwendolyn-corvid.bsky.social/post/3mnrxfigmu222 Edit: It's so interesting how if I post about culture war things people go "No culture war for me, just class war, thanks" Like what am I supposed to do as a trans person to end culture war issues? Just agree not to exist? But if I post stuff about how culture war and class are are largely the same thing I just get a bunch of "Nut uh, there really are racists." Like somehow that makes a difference. A racist without the structural support of the oligarchy trying to fuck people over is a problem, but a relatively minor one. If I was allowed to defend myself against violent transphobes without the system taking the transphobes side it wouldn't be nearly the issue that it is. Yes, racists/sexists/phobes exist without the billionaires cheering them on, but the oligarchy has been fueling these hateful ideals since Regan specifically to create the conditions we have today. They didn't just happen. "Christian" didn’t used to be nearly synonymous with homophobia, that whole thing was specifically developed by Republicans to bring about the current circumstances. Most of these "cultural issues" are purposefully exacerbated by policy choice. Read your history books. Xenophobia and hate are not the natural condition of humans, that happens through cultural choices. This kind of class war has been going on since the dawn of history. Ancient peoples knew how to fan Xenophobia just as well as their modern equivalents, they weren't stupid. The only difference between now and 50 years ago is that the Republicans are scared due to shifting demographics and their masks are off with their desperation.
item.dc:creator: GwensBackOnHerBS

item.title: GovBrief Today #493
item.description: Donald Trump says he calls all the shots, and hours after he said it, Israel bombed Iran against his wishes. This is not a lie about crowd sizes. The leader of the world's strongest military spent Sunday begging Netanyahu to hold fire and believed he had won. Israel bombed Iran anyway. A president who cannot tell the truth about a war he started has nothing believable to say about ending it. He swears a deal is close and the missiles mean nothing. Believe the missiles. I've emailed 7,722 stories over 493 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260607-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/chagos-islands [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june7 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/screwworm [4] https://go.govbrief.today/mma-lawsuit [5] https://go.govbrief.today/deportees-car [6] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-mtp Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
